subcodes.title: Address to the friends at Rue St. Didier 30 in Paris, 1913-03-17
subcodes.first_line: My general health is well but my nerves are weak. My physical body is not afflicted with any ailment, but having lived forty years in the prison of Acca
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha
